author: lOrm
content: Fix implemented in src/config/mod.rs. Root cause confirmed by reading config v0.15 env.rs:collect() — naive key.replace(separator, ".") with sep="_" fragmented field names containing underscores (api_key → api.key, my_ai → my.ai). Changed to separator="__" (double underscore) for both prefix_separator and separator in the canonical Environment source. Legacy OPENCLAUDIA_ single-underscore form still loaded at lower priority with tracing::warn deprecation via warn_legacy_env_vars(). Added 5 tests: routes api_key correctly, disambiguates underscored provider name, legacy resolves unambiguous keys, canonical wins over legacy, detection predicate classifies correctly. 1249 tests passing (was 1222 baseline + other additions), rustfmt clean, no new clippy errors.
